title: OECD Average Annual Wages per Full-Time Equivalent Employee
source_org: OECD (Employment, Labour and Social Affairs Directorate)
units: national currency and USD PPP-converted, current and constant (2024) prices — see UNIT_MEASURE/PRICE_BASE columns
license_terms: OECD Terms and Conditions — free reuse with attribution
notes: SDMX dataflow OECD.ELS.SAE:DSD_EARNINGS@AV_AN_WAGE(1.0), 'Average annual wages'. Average annual wage per FTE dependent employee, national-accounts-based total wage bill divided by average FTE employee count. All PAY_PERIOD/PRICE_BASE/AGGREGATION_OPERATION/SEX combinations kept (no sub-filter beyond country) since file is small.
